jsonLd.title: Lead Investment Banker at NSE
jsonLd.description:
We at NSE are looking for an experienced Investment Banker based out of Amritsar. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About NSE:
NSE is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Referral bonus program
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NSE!
